stemHtml: An aircraft A deviates from its ATC clearance in order to follow an ACAS RA. Simultaneously, an aircraft B declares an emergency. The flight crew of aircraft A is ready to report the ACAS RA to the ATS unit. The flight crew of aircraft A should...

options.a: wait for aircraft B to complete its message, as a DISTRESS message takes priority over all other messages.
options.b: interfere in order to Immediately report the ACAS RA, as similar messages take priority over all other messages.
options.c: interfere in order to immediately report the ACAS RA, as this message is considered an URGENCY message.
options.d: wait for the other aircraft to complete its message, because aircraft B commenced its transmission earlier.
